text_block_list.text: On a certain outing with Stay Gold ——

Looking towards where Stay Gold was 
pointing, I saw a Claw Machine with horsegirl 
plushies.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
They make good souvenirs. It seems that 
you can only get them at certain locations.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: They're also popular with foreigners. They get super happy when you give them one y'know? It's that "Japan KAWAII" thing.
choice_data_list: Ooh… then I want to get a lot!
Ooh… then I want to get many!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, though it's pretty hard… You 
good at this sort of thing Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I'm sure you're better than me. 
Ah, do you wanna try to get some for 
me then?
